Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality

Interface IEquivalenceManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
EquivalenceManager
public interface IEquivalenceManager
Interface to the equivalence manager.

The equivelance manager is responsible for storing fact and query equalities and provides mechanisms to add them, remove them and backtrack to a certain level.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IFactResult
    addFactEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
    Adds the given fact equality to the equivalence manager.
    List<? extends IInstantiationResult>
    addInstantiationEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
    Adds the given instantiation to the equivalence manager.
    IQueryResult
    addQueryEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
    Adds the given query equality to the equivalence manager.
    void
    backtrack(Level level)
    Backtracks the equivalence manager to the given level (not included).
    void
    removeInstantiation(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
    Removes the given instantiation from the equivalence manager.
    void
    removeQueryEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
    Removes the given query equality from the equivalence manager.

  • Method Details

    • removeQueryEquality

      void removeQueryEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
      Removes the given query equality from the equivalence manager.
      Parameters:
      equality - the equality to remove
      clause - the clause containing the equality

    • addFactEquality

      IFactResult addFactEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
      Adds the given fact equality to the equivalence manager. Returns the associated fact result or null if nothing can be derived from this new fact.

      The given clause must be a unit clause containing the given equality either as an equality literal or as a condition.

      Parameters:
      equality - the fact to add
      clause - the clause containing the fact.
      Returns:
      the fact result or null if nothing is derived

    • addQueryEquality

      IQueryResult addQueryEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
      Adds the given query equality to the equivalence manager. Returns the associated query result or null if this query cannot be solved immediately.

      The given clause must be non-unit and must contain the given equality.

      Parameters:
      equality - the query to add
      clause - the clause containing the query
      Returns:
      the query result or null if nothing is derived

    • backtrack

      void backtrack(Level level)
      Backtracks the equivalence manager to the given level (not included).

      This backtracks all information related to the backtracked levels. It removes all facts and query equalities from those levels. It also removes instantiations from those levels.

      Parameters:
      level - the new level

    • addInstantiationEquality

      List<? extends IInstantiationResult> addInstantiationEquality(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
      Adds the given instantiation to the equivalence manager. Returns the corresponding instantiation result or null if no instantiation is immediately found.

      The given equality must contain exactly one variable and one constant.

      Parameters:
      equality - the equality to add
      clause - the clause which contains the equality
      Returns:

    • removeInstantiation

      void removeInstantiation(EqualityLiteral equality, Clause clause)
      Removes the given instantiation from the equivalence manager.
      Parameters:
      equality - the equality to remove
      clause - the clause containing the equality
